title: An Act Regarding the Impact of Certain Nonemergency Transportation Services Contracts on Community Action Agency Programs
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Apr 29, 2025
last_house_action: 3/18/2025 - Committee on Health and Human Services suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/29/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
